title: polygala peshmenii
intro: Polygala peshmenii, also known as the "Yazida or Turkish honey milkwort", is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, primarily for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Polygala peshmenii are attributed to its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Polygala peshmenii are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate coughs, colds, and other respiratory-related ailments.
